  • Uses of ReliefScenario.Builder in neqsim.process.safety.overpressure

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ReliefScenario.Builder
    ReliefScenario.Builder.addAssumption(String assumption)
    Adds a single assumption string.
    ReliefScenario.Builder
    ReliefScenario.Builder.assumptions(List<String> assumptionList)
    Adds all assumption strings from a collection.
    ReliefScenario.Builder
    ReliefScenario.Builder.compressibility(double compressibility)
    Sets the relieving-fluid compressibility factor Z.
    ReliefScenario.Builder
    ReliefScenario.Builder.credible(boolean credible)
    Sets whether the scenario is credible and eligible for governing-case selection.
    ReliefScenario.Builder
    ReliefScenario.Builder.densityKgPerM3(double densityKgPerM3)
    Sets the relieving-fluid density (used for liquid relief volume-flow conversion).
    ReliefScenario.Builder
    ReliefScenario.Builder.dynamicallyDetermined(boolean dynamicallyDetermined)
    Sets whether the relief rate was determined by dynamic simulation.
    ReliefScenario.Builder
    ReliefScenario.Builder.gasDensityKgPerM3(double gasDensityKgPerM3)
    Sets the inlet gas density for two-phase relief sizing.
    ReliefScenario.Builder
    ReliefScenario.Builder.gasMassFraction(double gasMassFraction)
    Sets the inlet gas (vapour) mass fraction for two-phase relief sizing.
    ReliefScenario.Builder
    ReliefScenario.Builder.latentHeatJPerKg(double latentHeatJPerKg)
    Sets the latent heat of vaporization used for fire and flashing two-phase relief.
    ReliefScenario.Builder
    ReliefScenario.Builder.liquidDensityKgPerM3(double liquidDensityKgPerM3)
    Sets the inlet liquid density for two-phase relief sizing.
    ReliefScenario.Builder
    ReliefScenario.Builder.liquidHeatCapacityJPerKgK(double liquidHeatCapacityJPerKgK)
    Sets the liquid heat capacity used for the two-phase omega method.
    ReliefScenario.Builder
    ReliefScenario.Builder.molarMassKgPerMol(double molarMassKgPerMol)
    Sets the relieving-fluid molar mass.
    ReliefScenario.Builder
    ReliefScenario.Builder.phase(ReliefPhase phase)
    Sets the relieving phase.
    ReliefScenario.Builder
    ReliefScenario.Builder.reliefRateKgPerS(double reliefRateKgPerS)
    Sets the required relief rate.
    ReliefScenario.Builder
    ReliefScenario.Builder.reliefTemperatureK(double reliefTemperatureK)
    Sets the relieving temperature.
    ReliefScenario.Builder
    ReliefScenario.Builder.specificHeatRatio(double specificHeatRatio)
    Sets the relieving-fluid specific-heat ratio Cp/Cv.
    ReliefScenario.Builder
    ReliefScenario.Builder.standardReference(String standardReference)
    Overrides the governing standard reference.
    ReliefScenario.Builder
    ReliefScenario.Builder.viscosityPaS(double viscosityPaS)
    Sets the relieving-liquid dynamic viscosity (used for the API 520 liquid viscosity correction).
